[[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant Major]] '''Enfield''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Death Star Trooper/Legends|Death Star trooper]] who served as a detention block guard in the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]] during the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
[[File:Interrogation_techs.png|thumb||left|Enfield and Grenwick accompany Vader to interrogate Leia]]
Enfield often served as the representative of [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Shann Childsen/Legends|Shann Childsen]]. He was in command of the troops that were responsible for the detention block's security. He was also an interrogation technician.<ref name="IV" />

Around [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Enfield, alongside his senior tactical advisor, [[Corporal/Legends|Corporal]] [[Grenwick]], were ordered to escort [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to the then-imprisoned [[Alderaanian/Legends|Alderaanian]] [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa's]] [[Cell 2187/Legends|prison cell]] in order to [[Torture/Legends|interrogate]] her.<ref name="IV" />

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']]
